title: × gastrolea quehlii
intro: × Gastrolea quehlii, also known as the False Rue-leaved Grape-hyacinth, is a type of flowering plant in the family Colchicaceae. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of × Gastrolea quehlii are not well-documented, but it has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues. However, due to the lack of scientific research, it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparation, which can include infusions, tinctures, or dried extracts.
